title: I say yes to wealth in every layer of me
subtitle: A short affirmation for aligning all parts of yourself with the wealth you're working towards.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 20 of the MONEY program. Use when the conscious intention and the daily actions aren't matching up, or when you want to address resistance at a level below deliberate thought.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 20 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning as part of a consistent practice — this one works cumulatively, not as a single-use fix.

content.text: A single-sentence affirmation from Day 20 of the MONEY program. It addresses the mismatch between wanting wealth consciously and operating from resistance at a deeper level — the pattern that produces self-sabotage without visible cause.
I say yes to wealth in every layer of me.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, slow, with a pause between each repetition. This one works best said standing, both feet on the floor. The words are an instruction to the whole system, not just the thinking mind.
Adapted from Day 20 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
